summary: Recent updates to the Media Control and Session area of Firefox focus on enhancing the logging capabilities for media sessions. By implementing **MOZ_LOG_FMT**, the browser can now produce more structured and easily interpretable log messages related to media playback and session management. This change improves the debugging process for developers, making it easier to track down issues with media features such as playback controls and audio/video sessions. While users may _not see a visible change_ in their browsing experience, these improvements ultimately contribute to a more stable and reliable media experience overall.
